home.bio: I'm Sholahudin Jauhari El Sya'na, a Fullstack Web Developer and Informatics student at Ahmad Dahlan University. With experience from three internships and multiple freelance projects, I have developed various web-based solutions, including School Information Systems, Workforce Distribution Platforms, Rental Management Systems, and Business Profile Websites. I specialize in React, TypeScript, Laravel, FilamentPHP, and MySQL, with experience in building responsive user interfaces, REST API integrations, admin dashboards, and scalable web applications. Beyond coding, I enjoy learning new technologies, solving real-world problems, and collaborating with teams to create impactful digital products.

hero.bio_1: Hey there! I'm Sholahudin, a Fullstack Web Developer and Informatics student at Ahmad Dahlan University. I enjoy building modern web applications that combine performance, scalability, and great user experiences.
hero.bio_1_fe: Hello! I'm Sholahudin, a Frontend Web Developer and IT student at Universitas Ahmad Dahlan. I enjoy building modern web interfaces that prioritize performance, usability, and smooth user interactions.
hero.bio_1_be: Hello! I'm Sholahudin, a Backend Web Developer and IT student at Universitas Ahmad Dahlan. I focus on building secure, reliable, and high-performance server logic, database architectures, and REST APIs.
hero.bio_2: With experience from three internships and multiple freelance projects, I've worked on School Information Systems, Workforce Distribution Platforms, Rental Management Systems, and Business Profile Websites. I specialize in React, Vue, TypeScript, Laravel, and MySQL, turning ideas into reliable and impactful digital solutions.
hero.bio_2_fe: With experience from three internships and various freelance projects, I have worked on interactive UI slicing, real-time API integration (SSE), and interactive dashboards. My specialties include React, Vue, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS to create intuitive digital products.
hero.bio_2_be: With experience from three internships and various freelance projects, I am accustomed to managing MySQL/PostgreSQL database administration, building REST APIs, and developing admin dashboards using Laravel and FilamentPHP for scalable digital solutions.

entries.description: Contributed to the development of a Workforce Distribution & Job Readiness Information System, a multi-stakeholder platform connecting schools, students, companies, and government institutions.
entries.description_fe: Contributed to the frontend development of the Workforce Distribution platform using React.js and Tailwind CSS, designing responsive multi-stakeholder interfaces for students and companies.
entries.description_be: Built and optimized REST APIs and PostgreSQL database architecture for the workforce management system using Laravel, deployed using Docker containers.

entries.description: Contributed to the development of AI-driven enterprise software. Focused on frontend development for TING software, including UI implementation, backend API integration, and real-time data handling using Server-Sent Events (SSE). Also developed and redesigned company websites, built an Agentic AI demo, and collaborated closely with backend engineers, product teams, and the CEO.
entries.description_fe: Focused on the frontend development of the AI-based enterprise software (TING) using Vue.js, REST API integration, handling real-time data with Server-Sent Events (SSE), and company website redesign.
entries.description_be: Assisted in designing API endpoints for AI module integration, optimizing server throughput for real-time data streaming (SSE), and collaborating on data modeling for the TING software.

entries.project: School Information System – SD Muhammadiyah Bausasran
entries.description: Developed a full-featured School Information System including a dynamic school profile website, admin panel, and online student admission (PPDB) system. Independently handled frontend and backend development, database management, and content management features for administrators.
entries.description_fe: Designed a dynamic school UI, responsive student registration system (PPDB), and interactive admin dashboard using FilamentPHP and Tailwind CSS.
entries.description_be: Built the core online registration (PPDB) logic, managed the school's MySQL database, and constructed dynamic content management panels using Laravel & FilamentPHP.

entries.description: Built a responsive fullstack web application for a car rental business. Developed a Laravel backend and React TypeScript frontend, including admin features for managing vehicles, rental schedules, and customer data.
entries.description_fe: Developed a responsive car rental interface with React & TypeScript, including interactive booking schedule forms and customer dashboards.
entries.description_be: Built the car management system, rental scheduling logic, automatic fare calculation, and backend REST APIs using Laravel & MySQL.

entries.description: Developed a business profile website for a building materials store with a dynamic product catalog. Integrated an admin panel for content management and focused on clean UI/UX to improve business credibility.
entries.description_fe: Led the UI slicing of the interactive product catalog, designed construction store navigation flows, and ensured clean visual transitions using Tailwind CSS.
entries.description_be: Managed project catalog database flows, integrated the admin panel for product editing, and managed store inventory data.

entries.description: Built a school management system to digitize administrative tasks, including student data management, activity scheduling, and news updates. Designed a user-friendly admin dashboard for school operators.
entries.description_fe: Designed the admin dashboard interface for school operators, student data management, and dynamic news layouts with React TypeScript.
entries.description_be: Built the student registration backend modules, database relations for activity schedules, and news management using Laravel & MySQL.

entries.description: Designed and developed a responsive tourism destination website for a competition project, focusing on visual storytelling, responsive layout, and smooth animations using AOS.
entries.description_fe: Designed rich animated tourism storytelling using Tailwind CSS & AOS, optimizing layout responsiveness for mobile user experience.
entries.description_be: Optimized tourism image assets and loading scripts for maximum static web performance, along with integrating local booking forms.

entries.description: Led the organizing committee in designing and executing celebratory programs. Managed cross-division coordination, event timeline, and ensured smooth execution. Promoted faculty identity and unity.

entries.project: BEM Faculty of Industrial Technology (BEM FTI)
entries.description: Led department planning by creating program matrices, organized leadership development agendas. Supervised department members, ensured program alignment with organizational goals. Responsible for team coordination, delegation, and communication flow.

Oversaw the entire event execution from planning to post-event evaluation. Coordinated multiple teams (technical, publication, logistics). Ensured academic and competitive standards while promoting collaboration.

entries.role: Staff of Strategic and Aspirational Studies (AKASTRAT)
entries.description: Served as a liaison between students and faculty. Collected and conveyed student aspirations to the department. Facilitated communication to ensure student concerns were heard.

entries.title: Shoe Store Web Design
entries.description: UI/UX design concept for a shoe store website with a mobile-first approach, focusing on usability, modern aesthetics, and intuitive navigation across web devices.

entries.title: Freelance Management System (FMS)
entries.description: An all-in-one freelance management platform featuring an interactive dashboard, budget-tracked project boards with automatic progress indicators, checklist task details, file uploads, client invoice tracking, and a task deadline calendar view.
